Home / Departments / Healthcare

Healthcare Facilities
Without Boundaries

Rapidly deployable modular medical facilities delivered through our partnership with Hospitals Without Borders.

Start a Project Our Services
Overview

Service Overview

Through our partnership with Hospitals Without Borders (HWB), we deliver modular medical facilities that expand access to care. From clinics and pediatric units to emergency response and telemedicine, we combine rapid deployment with customization so each module meets clinical workflows, infection prevention, and local requirements.

Capabilities

What We Deliver

Modular Clinics

Primary and specialty care shells delivered with clinical adjacencies, infection control, and utility rough-ins coordinated for rapid commissioning.

Telemedicine Centers

Technology-forward modules with acoustic treatment, network redundancy, and provider workflows that mirror brick-and-mortar standards.

Pediatric Facilities

Family-centered layouts, durable finishes, and wayfinding tuned for young patients—deployed where communities need capacity fastest.

Emergency Response Units

Rapidly deployable clinical infrastructure for surge events, with logistics packages aligned to field operations and local regulations.

Laboratory Modules

Controlled environments for diagnostics and support labs with mechanical coordination for exhaust, filtration, and biosafety considerations.

Administrative Centers

Back-office and command spaces that scale with clinical footprints—so operations, records, and coordination stay adjacent to care.

50+

Healthcare facilities

15

Countries

HWB

Partner

Impact

Value We Create

50+ Healthcare Facilities Delivered

A growing portfolio of modular medical assets deployed with partners who understand clinical operations—not just square footage.

15 Countries Served

International experience adapting modules to local codes, climate, and supply chains while preserving clinical performance.

Rapid Deployment

Factory production and disciplined site work compress timelines so communities gain capacity when it matters most.

Community Impact

Facilities designed to serve underserved populations with dignity, access, and continuity of care.

50+ Facilities delivered worldwide
15 Countries with active programs
Fast Rapid deployment when timelines are critical

Care infrastructure that meets the moment

Partner with us to design, fabricate, and deliver modular healthcare spaces that expand capacity with clinical rigor and humanitarian intent.
